events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still commanding the stage! Wishing a very happy birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger. What's your favourite Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on this day in 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' being the very first music video ever played.

angles.name: MTV's Debut
angles.copy: Remember when MTV changed everything? 45 years ago today, 'Video Killed The Radio Star' ushered in a new era. Did it really kill the radio star, though? We think not!

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their groundbreaking debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on this day in 1994, featuring classics like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Milestone
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your go-to track from this Britpop masterpiece?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place on this day in 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. A truly iconic festival that defined a generation.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, would have been 91
events.blurb: On the anniversary of his passing, we remember the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since we lost the King. Elvis Presley's music and charisma continue to captivate. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their eleventh studio album, 'Abbey Road', on this day in 1969, featuring iconic tracks and that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is as famous as the music within. What's your top pick from the record?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, the formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, celebrates her 75th birthday today.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the one and only Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that's instantly recognisable. What's your favourite Pretenders hit?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Liam Gallagher, the distinctive voice of Oasis and a Britpop legend, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon released his timeless anthem 'Imagine' on this day in 1975, a song that continues to resonate globally.

angles.name: Imagine's Message
angles.copy: Fifty-one years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A powerful message of peace that still feels incredibly relevant today. What does the song mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple revolutionised portable music on this day in 2001 with the release of the very first iPod.

angles.name: iPod's Impact
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple changed how we listen to music forever. How many songs did you fit on yours?

events.title: It's James Bond Day!
events.blurb: October 5th is officially James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Bond, James Bond
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating 007 and all the iconic films, gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes. Who's your favourite Bond?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary artist and peace activist, John Lennon.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: Thinking of John Lennon on his 86th birthday. His music and message continue to inspire generations. What's your favourite Lennon song?

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese, known for Monty Python and Fawlty Towers, celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' 58 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, famously known as 'The White Album', on this day in 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, experimental masterpiece. What's your standout track from the double LP?
